estimators.name: Kevin Farkas
estimators.title: Sales Estimator
personalization_hooks: Title 'Sales Estimator' is unusual — combined sales + estimating means Kevin owns both qualifying the project AND pricing it. He IS the front door.
Vulcan does residential + commercial across MB — get on Kevin's bid list for the commercial / multi-family side.
LinkedIn page vulcan-construction-winnipeg confirms he is Winnipeg-based.
Sales-mindset estimator responds well to clear value props — Ashrah's '6-day delay forecasting' is a sellable feature he can pitch upward.
